name: Callaway Golf Co
summary: PART I OVERVIEW Callaway Golf Company, together with our wholly owned subsidiaries (collectively, the Company, Callaway Golf, Callaway, we, our, or us), is a leading golf equipment, gear and apparel company with a portfolio of global brands, including Callaway Golf, Odyssey, TravisMathew and OGIO. Through an unwavering commitment to innovation and premium craftsmanship, Callaway designs, manufactures, and sells high-performance golf clubs, golf balls, apparel, bags, and other accessoriessetting ...
